title: Cloudflare Tunnel Ingress Configuration
description: Defines hostname-to-service mappings for a Cloudflare Tunnel. Derived from the cloudflare/cloudflared Go structs (config/configuration.go, ingress/config.go). See: https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-one/connections/connect-networks/configure-tunnels/origin-configuration/

ingress.description: Ordered list of ingress rules. The last rule must be a catch-all with no hostname.

hostname.description: Public hostname for this rule (e.g. app.example.com). Omit only for the catch-all rule.

path.description: Optional path filter using glob syntax (e.g. /api/*).

service.description: Origin service URL (e.g. http://app:8080) or built-in like http_status:404.

originRequest.description: Per-rule origin request settings. Matches cloudflared OriginRequestConfig struct.

connectTimeout.description: Timeout for establishing a new TCP connection to the origin (e.g. 30s, 1m).

tlsTimeout.description: Timeout for completing a TLS handshake to the origin.

tcpKeepAlive.description: Keep-alive period for TCP connections to the origin.

noHappyEyeballs.description: Disable the Happy Eyeballs algorithm for origin connections.

keepAliveConnections.description: Maximum number of idle keep-alive connections to the origin.

keepAliveTimeout.description: Timeout after which idle keep-alive connections are closed.

httpHostHeader.description: Override the HTTP Host header sent to the origin.

originServerName.description: SNI hostname used for TLS verification with the origin.

matchSNItoHost.description: Automatically set the SNI to match the hostname in the ingress rule.

caPool.description: Path to a CA certificate pool for verifying the origin's TLS certificate.

noTLSVerify.description: Disable TLS certificate verification to the origin.

disableChunkedEncoding.description: Disable chunked transfer encoding to the origin.

bastionMode.description: Enable bastion mode for SSH/RDP proxying.

ipRules.description: IP access rules for the origin.

allow.description: Whether to allow or deny matching traffic.

http2Origin.description: Enable HTTP/2 connections to the origin server.

access.description: Cloudflare Access configuration for authenticating requests to this origin.

required.description: When true, fail requests that don't arrive through an Access-authenticated endpoint.

audTag.description: Audience tags to verify Access JWT against.
